```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California immigrants pay nearly $130 billion annually in state and federal taxes.",
    "88% of farmworkers in California are immigrants.",
    "Immigrants hold one-third of all tourism and hospitality jobs in California.",
    "Immigrants make up 41% of the construction workforce in California.",
    "50% of certified nursing assistants in California nursing homes are immigrants.",
    "California immigrants contribute $715 billion in gross domestic product.",
    "The Department of Justice spent approximately $40 million on legal defense to protect billions of dollars for California between 2016 and 2021.",
    "California secured nearly $60 million in federal public-safety grant reimbursements from successful legal defenses.",
    "The total base wildfire protection budget for CalFire has nearly tripled over the past 10 years."
  ]
}
```
